keys.title: Tier 2 infrastructure credentials addendum
keys.body:
**Version:** 1.0 (draft)

This addendum applies when your organization opts into **Credential Disclosure Tier 2** on the Vouus platform.

## Scope

Tier 2 may disclose, via one-time secure reveal:

- ERP built-in super-user credentials (e.g. Frappe `Administrator`, Odoo `admin`, Gokiri thinERP `sysadmin`)
- Optionally: database or OS access when contractually agreed

## Customer responsibilities

- You are responsible for storage, rotation, and leakage of credentials after reveal.
- Vouus operators do not access Tier 2 credentials during normal operations.
- Misuse or public exposure may void certain SLA remedies.

## Regulatory

Where GDPR or PDPA applies, Tier 2 disclosure is performed under your instruction as data controller for infrastructure access decisions.

Contact sales or support to execute this addendum before enabling Tier 2 on your tenant.
